minimum_qualification: Librarian/information specialist experienced in health-systematic-review searching
independence_requirement: Must not have authored the pilot search
responsibilities: Peer review and translate search strategies; verify executed histories and exports.

minimum_qualification: Training in systematic-review screening and harms extraction
independence_requirement: Must make decisions without seeing Reviewer 2 decisions
responsibilities: Title/abstract and full-text screening; extraction; result-level RoB 2.

minimum_qualification: Training in systematic-review screening and harms extraction
independence_requirement: Must make decisions without seeing Reviewer 1 decisions
responsibilities: Title/abstract and full-text screening; extraction; result-level RoB 2.

independence_requirement: Must not replace independent first-pass decisions
responsibilities: Resolve screening/extraction/RoB conflicts using prespecified rules.

minimum_qualification: Psychiatry/clinical pharmacology and psychedelic-trial safety expertise
responsibilities: Clarify clinical meaning; cannot insert unsupported event counts.

independence_requirement: Independent check of frozen code and assumptions

minimum_qualification: Relevant patient/public perspective with safeguarding support
independence_requirement: No requirement to agree with investigators
responsibilities: Review outcome relevance, language, and interpretation boundaries.
